overall.description: First-person game footage showing exploration of a moody mountain river environment at dusk. The character walks along a rocky riverbank with autumn vegetation before entering the water and swimming toward a distant waterfall, with dark stormy skies and atmospheric fog throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky riverbank beside the water, approaching the river's edge

entered.detail: rocky shoreline terrain with scattered stones and dirt
dense dark pine trees covering the mountain slopes
steep rocky mountain faces with gray stone texture
weathered dead tree trunk standing near the water's edge
reddish-brown autumn bushes and grasses along the bank

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a rocky riverbank in a mountainous wilderness area. Dark pine forests cover the slopes in the background under stormy skies, with autumn-colored vegetation lining the shore. A dead tree stump stands near the water's edge as the camera moves steadily forward toward the river.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain river pool with distant waterfall

events.description: character steps off the riverbank and enters the water, transitioning from walking to swimming

agents.ego_description: swimming and wading through the river water toward the distant waterfall, with the camera low to the water surface

entered.detail: dark rippling river water filling the foreground and reflecting the sky
cascading waterfall visible in the distance between the cliffs
steep rock formations lining the left side of the river canyon
steep rock formations lining the right side of the river canyon

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the river and moves through the water toward a distant waterfall. The perspective shifts to a low swimming view with dark water rippling in the foreground. Rocky cliffs rise on both sides of the river canyon, framing the waterfall that becomes visible in the center distance. The atmospheric lighting remains dim and moody throughout the water traversal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rugged riverbank into the depths of a moody mountain canyon. It begins by walking along a rocky shore lined with autumn-colored vegetation, passing a dead tree stump while dark pine forests loom under stormy skies. As the camera reaches the water's edge, the perspective shifts seamlessly into a low swimming view, gliding through rippling dark water. The scene then opens up as the camera moves deeper into the river, framed by towering rocky cliffs that rise on both sides. This traversal continues through the dim, atmospheric light before finally centering on a distant waterfall emerging at the end of the canyon.
